General.Name: Niche-Tech Group Ltd
General.Description: Niche-Tech Semiconductor Materials Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of semiconductor packaging materials in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and internationally. It offers copper-bonding wires, power copper bonding wires, aluminum silicon bonding wires, heavy aluminum bonding wires, silver alloy bonding wires, pd-coated copper wires, copper alloy bonding wires, gold bonding wires, and gold alloy bonding wires; and silicone encapsulant for LED filament and COB LED. The company also provides epoxy encapsulant products, such as glob top epoxy, LED epoxy encapsulant, and LED liquid molding epoxy; die attach adhesives for COB, LED die attached epoxy and silicone, and die attached silver adhesive; and soldering materials. It serves manufacturers of LEDs, camera modules, and integrated circuits. The company was formerly known as Niche-Tech Group Limited and changed its name to Niche-Tech Semiconductor Materials Limited in September 2022. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Tai Po, Hong Kong. Niche-Tech Semiconductor Materials Limited is a subsidiary of Niche-Tech Investment Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Hong Kong Science Park, Tai Po, Hong Kong
